title: Fluffy Fold Corn Delight
description: A festive Moroccan-inspired dish featuring garlic-flavored fluffy white corn mixed with plant-based ingredients for a flavorful and easy-to-make snack.
instructions: Prepare the corn by boiling it in water until soft. Drain and set aside.
Mince the garlic cloves finely and sauté them in olive oil with a pinch of salt and pepper until fragrant.
Fold the minced garlic into the cooked corn, adding sun-dried tomatoes and pine nuts for texture and flavor.
Scoop avocado flesh into a bowl, mash lightly with a fork or potato masher. Mix in salsa to taste.
Place folded corn on top of mashed avocado, garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
